description: Update iOS/macOS PIR debug run flows so scan/opt-out execution uses the raw JSON entered/selected in the editor as the source of truth. Keep one decode for native validation/model creation, but avoid DataBroker re-encode round-trips in execution setup. Ensure action passthrough to WebView relies on preserved raw action payload for debug runs.
title: PIR debug mode: execute from raw broker JSON instead of typed round-trip

description: Update iOS/macOS PIR debug broker list + View JSON to display the exact raw broker JSON stored in DB (BrokerResource.rawJSON), not JSON generated from typed DataBroker models. Add/consume vault API to fetch broker resources with raw JSON for debug UI, and remove toJSONString-based model re-encoding for this view path.
title: PIR debug mode: View JSON should show persisted raw broker blob

description: Define and codify broker identity semantics across DBP: when to use URL identity versus local DB id, and how DataBroker Equatable/Hashable should align. Scope: document decision, implement consistent helpers/comparators, and add regression tests for upsert matching and identity-based operations.
title: Codify DataBroker identity semantics for ingest/update

description: Integrate BGContinuedProcessingTask (iOS 26+) into PIR to allow user-initiated scans to continue running after the app is backgrounded, with system-owned progress UI (Dynamic Island / notification banner). This is an additional tool alongside existing BGProcessingTask (periodic background) and beginBackgroundTask (30s grace period). 54% of users are on iOS 26+ as of Jan 2026. See Asana task 1213379553046300 for full scope and 1213433655862025 for hack phase plan.
title: iOS 26 BGContinuedProcessingTask API integration
